text.title: AI Story Truth Checklist Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the vetting-record shape, the decision rule, and the traceability map.

list.item: story_id (string)
vetted_at_utc (ISO timestamp)
vetted_by (BA name)
persona_ref (persona id from personas.yaml or null)
jtbd_ref (jtbd id from research/jtbd.md or null)
checklist_results (object with 8 boolean keys + notes)
stats_flagged (array of {snippet, source_url_or_null, status})
edge_cases_present (object: failure_path, empty_state, privacy)
ac_count (integer)
ac_traceable_count (integer)
decision (enum: pass, revise, scrap)
revise_notes (string; required when decision != pass)
scrap when ANY: persona_ref is null; stats_flagged contains any `unverified` AND stat affects core claim; ac_count = 0.
revise when ANY: jtbd_ref null; edge cases incomplete; ac_traceable_count < ac_count.
pass when all checklist_results are true AND no scrap / revise triggers.
Vetted stories accumulate links: story_id → persona_ref, jtbd_ref, research artefacts referenced in stats.
The traceability map is the audit trail; the team can re-derive "why does this story exist" in one query.
Stories that lose traceability after a research-doc deletion are flagged in a weekly audit.

antipattern.description: decision = pass while jtbd_ref is null.
antipattern.reason: r2 violation. JTBD anchor is required.

antipattern.description: decision = pass while stats_flagged has unverified entries.
antipattern.reason: r3 violation. Unverified stats must be removed or sourced.
r4 violation. Failure path is mandatory.

antipattern.description: ac_count > 0 AND ac_traceable_count = 0 AND decision = pass.
antipattern.reason: r5 violation. AC must be traceable.

list.item: persona_ref points to a real id in personas.yaml.
jtbd_ref points to a real id in research/jtbd.md.
Every stat has a source URL or status `unverified`.
Edge-case map has all three keys.
revise_notes populated when decision != pass.
